summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mira AI Concierge System. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified: Travel page with Mira contextual panel, full-screen Ask Mira page with pet sidebar, personalized messages with pet name, ticket creation with correct structure, pillar detection (travel from cab request), and Pet Soul data integration.
critical_code_review_comments: mira_routes.py correctly implements ticket creation for every interaction
Pillar detection works correctly - 'cab' keyword maps to 'travel' pillar
Emergency keywords trigger immediate escalation with critical urgency
Pet Soul data is loaded and used for personalization in chat responses
MiraContextPanel.jsx correctly shows personalized message with pet name on pillar pages
MiraPage.jsx correctly displays pet sidebar with Pet Soul profile data
Ticket structure includes pet_soul_snapshot for full context preservation
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test user with pets Mojo and Mystique
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mira AI Concierge System fully functional. Test user dipali@clubconcierge.in has 2 pets (Mojo - Indie, Mystique - Shihtzu). Mira creates tickets automatically with ticket_id in response. Pillar detection works for travel, emergency, care, etc. Pet Soul data is used for personalization.

mira_contextual_panel_on_travel_page.panel_visible: PASS - MiraContextPanel shows on right side
mira_contextual_panel_on_travel_page.personalized_message_guest: PASS - Shows 'Sign in to get personalized recommendations'
mira_contextual_panel_on_travel_page.personalized_message_logged_in: PASS - Shows 'I see you're planning travel with Mojo'

full_screen_ask_mira_page.pet_profile_displayed: PASS - Shows Mojo's profile with breed, gender, travel style, crate trained, handling
full_screen_ask_mira_page.welcome_message_personalized: PASS - 'Hello, Dipali! I see you have Mojo with you'
full_screen_ask_mira_page.quick_actions: PASS - Travel, Stay, Care, Dine, Celebrate, Advice buttons

mira_chat_creates_tickets.ticket_id_in_response: PASS - ticket_id returned in API response
mira_chat_creates_tickets.ticket_id_displayed: PASS - Ticket ID shown in header
mira_chat_creates_tickets.ticket_type: PASS - 'concierge' (upgraded from advisory due to booking intent)

mira_detects_travel_pillar.message: I need to book a cab for Mojo to the vet tomorrow

mira_uses_pet_soul_data.pet_name_known: PASS - Mira knows pet name 'Mojo' without asking
mira_uses_pet_soul_data.pet_profile_in_sidebar: PASS - Full Pet Soul data displayed
mira_uses_pet_soul_data.pet_soul_snapshot_in_ticket: PASS - Complete Pet Soul data stored in ticket

tickets_stored_in_mira_tickets.ticket_structure: PASS - Correct structure with ticket_id, pillar, member, pet, messages
tickets_stored_in_mira_tickets.pet_soul_snapshot: PASS - Full Pet Soul data preserved in ticket

api_tests_results.mira_session_retrieval: PASS - Returns session with ticket data
api_tests_results.mira_uses_pet_soul_data: PASS - Pet context returned in response

verification_summary.travel_page_mira_panel: VERIFIED - Contextual panel shows personalized message with pet name
verification_summary.ask_mira_full_page: VERIFIED - Full-screen page with pet sidebar and chat interface
verification_summary.ticket_creation: VERIFIED - Every chat creates a ticket with unique ID
verification_summary.pillar_detection: VERIFIED - Travel pillar detected from cab booking request
verification_summary.pet_soul_integration: VERIFIED - Mira knows pet name and uses Pet Soul data
verification_summary.ticket_storage: VERIFIED - Tickets stored in mira_tickets with correct structure
